text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who could have expected this turn of events?!
The notorious classic year racer is here to
compete in the race of everyone's dreams, the
Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will seize victory at this spring finale? It's
time for the runners of the Takarazuka Kinen to
take the track!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
To think that the day I face you would come so
soon...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
To be frank, this was not a part of my
calculations. But as a racer, I suppose I should
have seen it coming.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The timing was just right—there's no greater
chance for me to take you down than right now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Still as hotheaded as ever.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, how are you enjoying the Twinkle
Series?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Do you think it will fulfill you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All I know is that I want to run this race now. I
want to overtake you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well then, as your adversary, I will face you
without hesitation...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And make full use of my winning equation!
